name: python3-django-dbbackup
title: python3-django-dbbackup
summary: Backup and restore commands for Django
description:
Backup and restore commands for Django
This Django application provides management commands to help backup and
restore your project database and media files with various storages such as
Amazon S3, Dropbox, local file storage or any Django storage.
.
It is made for:
.
* Ensure your backup with GPG signature and encryption
* Archive with compression
* Deal easily with remote archiving
* Great to keep your development database up to date.
* Use Crontab or Celery to setup automated backups.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-django-dbbackup because Backup and restore commands for Django.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-django-dbbackup as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-django-dbbackup with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-django-dbbackup --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
